text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #10)

There is a ticket for it (not created by me), except that it's for the old sysutils/hammer2 directory.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=282629

I can create a new ticket for filesystems/hammer2 with COMMENT updated though.
